questionHtml:
The table shows data for the hydrolysis of a halogenoalkane, RCl.

Which statements are correct?

I.   The reaction is first order with respect to RCl.
II.  The reaction is second order overall.
III. The reaction proceeds by an SN2 mechanism.


A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III

meta.title: The table shows data for the hydrolysis of a halogenoalkane, RCl. Which statements are correct? I. The reaction is first order with respect to RCl.II. The reaction is second order
